com.chemaxon.descriptors.fingerprints.pf2d

Class PfTableReader

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.chemaxon.descriptors.db.MDTableReader<FloatVectorDescriptor>
      • com.chemaxon.descriptors.fingerprints.pf2d.PfTableReader

  • @Beta
public abstract class PfTableReader
extends MDTableReader<FloatVectorDescriptor>
    MDTable reader for 2D pharmacophore fingerprints.

    Please note that this interface is marked with @Beta annotation, so it can be subject of incompatible changes or removal in later releases.

    Author:
    Laszlo Antal
